message:
fix(parsers): improve robustness with lenient parsing

Makes parsers more tolerant of format variations and agent hallucinations:

## artifact-merge.ts

Enhanced transcript anchor regex to allow optional whitespace after §:
- Before: `/§(\d+)(?:-(\d+))?/g`
- After:  `/§\s*(\d+)(?:-(\d+))?/g`

This correctly parses anchors like "§ 42" (space after section symbol)
that appear in some transcript formats, preventing false "pure inference"
warnings in the linter.

## delta-parser.ts

Made ADD operation more lenient regarding target_id field:
- Previously: Rejected ADD operations that included target_id
- Now: Accepts and ignores target_id in ADD operations

Rationale: LLM agents sometimes hallucinate a target_id even when
adding new entities. Rather than rejecting the entire delta, we now
silently normalize by setting target_id to null for ADD operations.
This improves agent compatibility without compromising data integrity.

## operator-library.ts

Improved regex patterns for parsing operator cards from markdown:
1. Changed section boundary matching from `\n\n` to lookahead patterns
   - More robust against varying whitespace in source markdown
   - Uses `(?=\n\s*\*\*Next Section\*\*:)` instead of `\n\n\*\*Next Section\*\*:`

2. Added case-insensitivity (`/i` flag) to all section header matches
   - Handles "**Definition**" vs "**definition**" variations

3. Made backticks optional for canonical tag extraction
   - Before: Required format `\`tag-name\``
   - After:  Accepts both `\`tag-name\`` and `tag-name`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
